pain_point: Founders struggle with SEO issues like pages being crawled but not indexed, hindering organic traffic growth.
evidence: "I've been deep in SEO for years (it's literally what my SaaS does), and one of the most common issues I see founders deal with is this frustrating Google Search Console status: **'Crawled – currently not indexed.'"
pitch_copy: Stop letting Google ignore your pages—Jasper AI helps you craft SEO-optimized content that gets indexed fast, turning those frustrating crawls into real traffic and leads. Click here to start writing content that actually ranks.
